scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @klickit/domain && npm run build --workspace @klickit/providers && npm run build --workspace @klickit/sync-contracts && npm run build --workspace @klickit/gateway && npm run build --workspace @klickit/web
scripts.test: npm run build --workspace @klickit/domain --workspace @klickit/providers --workspace @klickit/sync-contracts && npm run test --workspaces --if-present && npm run test:migrations
scripts.typecheck: npm run build --workspace @klickit/domain --workspace @klickit/providers --workspace @klickit/sync-contracts && npm run typecheck --workspaces --if-present
scripts.verify: npm run verify:blueprints && npm run verify:toolchain
